desktop.subtitle: Virtual desktop
desktop.disabled_copy: Enable it in configuration to use the browser desktop workspace.
desktop.widget_system_body: Desktop files, apps, and widgets are persistent.
desktop.chat_welcome: Ask me to create apps, widgets, or files for this desktop.
desktop.embed_empty: This desktop app or widget file is empty.
config.section.virtual_desktop.label: Virtual Desktop
config.section.virtual_desktop.desc: Browser desktop workspace with agent-controlled apps, files, and widgets.
config.virtual_desktop.disabled_desc: Enable it to expose the desktop page and backend workspace.
config.virtual_desktop.first_party_note: First-party AuraGo module with persistent workspace and realtime backend connection.
help.virtual_desktop.enabled: Enables the desktop page, API, WebSocket connection, and persistent workspace.
help.virtual_desktop.readonly: Keeps the desktop browsable but blocks file, app, and widget changes.
help.virtual_desktop.allow_agent_control: Exposes the virtual_desktop tool so the agent can create apps, widgets, and files.
help.virtual_desktop.allow_generated_app: Allows generated JavaScript apps to be installed under Apps.
help.virtual_desktop.allow_python_jobs: Reserved for desktop apps that need agent-mediated backend Python work.
help.virtual_desktop.workspace_dir: Persistent directory used by the browser desktop.
help.virtual_desktop.max_file_size_mb: Maximum text file size the desktop can read or write.
help.virtual_desktop.control_level: Destructive actions can require confirmation or run in trusted mode.
help.virtual_desktop.max_ws_clients: Maximum number of connected desktop browser sessions.
desktop.confirm_delete_msg: This will remove {{path}} from the desktop workspace.
